chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: Burning abdominal pain after meals, worse when I lie down, about a month.

chunks.speaker: patient
chunks.text: I get nausea with it sometimes, but no vomiting.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: No weight loss and no black stools reported.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Abdomen is soft with mild epigastric tenderness on palpation.

chunks.speaker: clinician
chunks.text: Start a proton pump inhibitor, adjust diet, ultrasound if no improvement.
